sourcesContent: import React from 'react'; import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Container, Grid, Typography, Box, Card, CardContent, Button, Avatar, Paper, IconButton, } from '@mui/material'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import GitHubIcon from '@mui/icons-material/GitHub'; import LinkedInIcon from '@mui/icons-material/LinkedIn'; import EmailIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Email'; const MotionBox = motion(Box); const Home = () => { return ( {/* Hero Section */} Hi, I'm Your Name Software Developer & Tech Enthusiast Welcome to my portfolio! I'm passionate about creating innovative solutions and sharing knowledge through my work and publications. {/* Quick Links Section */} Certificates View my professional certifications and achievements Projects Explore my latest projects and GitHub repositories Publications Read my articles and technical publications {/* Social Links */} ); }; export default Home;
